title: Extended illumina (NOT ENOUGH ANIMATIONS support)
description:
This resource pack adds a 3D lantern and torch to your hand!
+NEA support
body:
## Extended Illumina is a resource pack that adds 3D lanterns and torches to your hand, making it perfect for immersive role-playing experiences.

_Extended Illumina doesn’t add custom models or textures, so it will work with nearly all lantern or torch resource packs._

_DYNAMIC LIGHTS RECOMMENDED FOR BETTER EXPERIENCE_

**vanilla version:** [Extended illumina](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/extended-illumina)
